title: Bug when selecting date and time in calendar view

posts.author: Sergio (Sergio Rodríguez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I will like to report a bug I don’t know if this is the correct forum but I will describe it anyway:

In a calendar view, when a guest user opens a card popup and tries to add a time in a previously selected date, the date changes to the actual date without modifying it.

It is a really annoying bug. I share a video in which you can see the bug: bugmonday.mp4 - Google Drive

Thanks
